attacking_style: Favors late, decisive attacks in final 2-3km of mountain stages after conserving energy on rival wheels. Prefers counterattacks after observing opponents rather than sustained long-range efforts which have failed repeatedly.
team_tactics: Relies heavily on single key domestique (KÄMNA) for final climb pacing to pre-position attacks. Benefits from team tempo control but struggles when isolated or forced to initiate without support, as seen in 2020 Giro failures.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep finishing climbs (10-17km) where positioning and final kick matter more than sustained power. Strong uphill sprint finish even from poor position. Vulnerable on technical descents and exposed on very long/sustained climbs where pure power dominates.
vulnerability: Time trialing remains critical weakness—lost 30 seconds by 10km in 2020 Giro ITT, showing pacing collapse. Exposed on sustained climbs under pressure (Tour de France 2023 podium slip). Failed solo attacks indicate insufficient form or tactical misjudgment without team support.
key_patterns: Wheel-following patience before final kilometer counterattacks: 2020 Laghi, 2020 Mount Buller, 2023 Dauphine (4+ instances)
Bonus second hunting and tactical sprints when defensively matched: 2022 Giro twice gained time this way
Relies on KÄMNA or single domestique for final 3km positioning: 2022 Marmolada, multiple Giro stages
Time trial weakness forces aggressive mountain tactics: lost Giro 2020 in ITT, forced risks in 2022
Form peaks sharply for specific GCs but fades mid-tour: 2023 Tour 4th to dropped, 2022 Giro crescendo
Struggles when forced to attack first without observing rivals: 2020 Stelvio solo attack failed completely
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 Tour showed early GC ambition (yellow jersey) but vulnerability emerged on sustained climbs in week 3, dropping from podium contention. Pattern suggests peaks well for preparation races but struggles maintaining form across three-week tours compared to 2022 Giro victory.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15
